reading.title: Reading: An interrupted evening
reading.passage: I was cooking dinner when the phone rang. I was watching TV when I heard the noise. Meanwhile, my neighbours were running outside. We were walking home when it started to rain.

questions.question: The writer was cooking when the phone rang.
questions.explanation: "I was cooking dinner when the phone rang."

questions.question: What were the neighbours doing meanwhile?

reading.title: Reading: Review — An unexpected event
reading.passage: I was walking to the shop where I used to buy bread every morning. While I was walking, a man who I knew told me that the shop was closed. If that happened to me, I would be very disappointed too.

questions.question: The shop was open.
questions.explanation: "told me that the shop was closed."

questions.question: What was the writer doing when he met the man?
questions.explanation: "While I was walking, a man who I knew told me..."
